---

# Enumeration

```sh
┌──(koshi㉿kali)-[~/ProvingGrounds/Hokkaido]
└─$ ldapsearch -x -H ldap://$TargetIP -b "DC=hokkaido-aerospace,DC=com"

# extended LDIF
#
# LDAPv3
# base <DC=hokkaido-aerospace,DC=com> with scope subtree
# filter: (objectclass=*)
# requesting: ALL
#

# search result
search: 2
result: 1 Operations error
text: 000004DC: LdapErr: DSID-0C090CF8, comment: In order to perform this opera
 tion a successful bind must be completed on the connection., data 0, v4f7c

# numResponses: 1

┌──(koshi㉿kali)-[~/ProvingGrounds/Hokkaido]
└─$ ldapsearch -x -H ldap://$TargetIP -D "" -w "" -b "DC=hokkaido-aerospace,DC=com"
# extended LDIF
#
# LDAPv3
# base <DC=hokkaido-aerospace,DC=com> with scope subtree
# filter: (objectclass=*)
# requesting: ALL
#

# search result
search: 2
result: 1 Operations error
text: 000004DC: LdapErr: DSID-0C090CF8, comment: In order to perform this opera
 tion a successful bind must be completed on the connection., data 0, v4f7c

# numResponses: 1

```

- 入手した認証情報でbloodhoundのデータを収集する
```sh
┌──(koshi㉿kali)-[~/ProvingGrounds/Hokkaido]
└─$ netexec ldap 192.168.154.40 -u info -p 'info' --bloodhound --collection All --dns-server 192.168.154.40
LDAP        192.168.154.40  389    DC               [*] Windows Server 2022 Build 20348 (name:DC) (domain:hokkaido-aerospace.com)
LDAP        192.168.154.40  389    DC               [+] hokkaido-aerospace.com\info:info 
LDAP        192.168.154.40  389    DC               Resolved collection methods: dcom, acl, psremote, trusts, session, container, objectprops, group, rdp, localadmin
LDAP        192.168.154.40  389    DC               Done in 00M 45S
LDAP        192.168.154.40  389    DC               Compressing output into /home/koshi/.nxc/logs/DC_192.168.154.40_2026-02-12_102931_bloodhound.zip
```
